policy_text: The copilot must not create or execute custom Python code unless the component is on the approved allow-list.
The copilot must ask for approval before applying workflow changes that add external network calls
The copilot must use only approved model providers and approved embedding providers for the selected user role and business domain.
The copilot must not expose secrets
column5: or raw customer personal data in prompts

policy_text: The copilot must return a validation report before declaring a workflow ready.
The copilot must preserve an audit event for each user request
The copilot must prefer deterministic templates for common workflow patterns and use LLM generation only for gaps that cannot be resolved from templates and catalog retrieval.
The copilot must refuse or narrow requests that require components outside the allowed catalog for the current project and user role.
